content.text:
Hi there! How can I help today? I can answer questions, explain topics, help with writing or editing, assist with coding, solve math problems, plan a project, or just chat. Tell me what you’d like to do, or pick a category below:

- Questions and explanations
- Writing and editing (emails, essays, resumes)
- Coding and debugging
- Math/science help
- Planning and brainstorming (projects, trips, study plans)
- Other

What would you like to work on?
